name: Md Farukuzzaman Faruk
title: PhD Student in Computer Science
affiliation: School of Computing & Informatics, University of Louisiana at Lafayette
tagline: Researching reliable, transparent AI systems — at the crossroads of deep learning theory and deep learning systems optimization.
objective: I want to build a career as a computer science researcher and educator, working at the crossroads of academic inquiry and industry application. My focus is on advancing AI systems that are reliable, transparent, and genuinely useful — bridging the gap between what we discover in the lab and what actually works in the world.

supervisor.name: Dr. Li Chen
supervisor.titleLine: Alfred and Helen Lamson/BORSF Endowed Associate Professor, School of Computing and Informatics, University of Louisiana at Lafayette
